hero.subtitle: SGP represents national and international phonographic producers throughout Paraguay and Paraguayan producers worldwide through our agreements with IFPI and WIPO.

pago.title: Get paid
pago.description: If you make music, you deserve to get paid every time it's played. We collect royalties in Paraguay and around the world through our agreements with IFPI and WIPO.

licencia.title: Get a licence
licencia.description: If you use recorded music in your business, radio, TV or online service, you need an SGP licence. Protect your activity and support creators.

regalias.title: Royalties Portal
regalias.description: Manage the collection of your phonographic rights

licencias.title: Licensing
licencias.description: Calculate and pay your music usage licence

repertorio.title: Repertoire
repertorio.description: Search the database of registered works

partners.title: We work on behalf of
partners.subtitle: We represent the leading labels and producers who trust SGP to manage their rights in Paraguay and worldwide.

newsPreview.title: Latest news
newsPreview.subtitle: Stay informed about the phonographic industry

footer.description: Society of Phonographic Producers Management of Paraguay. Member of IFPI and WIPO.

hero.title: Licences
hero.subtitle: Everything you need to know to legally use music in your business

radio.title: Radio & TV
radio.description: For radio and television broadcasters that transmit recorded music.

comercio.title: Shops & venues
comercio.description: For businesses, bars, restaurants and public spaces that play music.

digital.title: Digital platforms
digital.description: For streaming services, apps and online platforms.

eventos.title: Events
eventos.description: For live events, festivals and shows with recorded music.

calculator.subtitle: Fill in your details and we'll send you a personalised quote

pagopar.title: Pay your licence online
pagopar.subtitle: Use Pagopar to pay quickly and securely. Special discount for online payment.
pagopar.recurrente: Enable recurring payments and never miss a renewal

hero.title: Royalties for producers
hero.subtitle: Receive what you're owed for every play of your music in Paraguay and worldwide

registro.title: Register your repertoire
registro.description: Enrol your phonographic productions with SGP with all necessary information.

monitoreo.title: We monitor usage
monitoreo.description: SGP monitors the use of your music on radio, TV, platforms and events in Paraguay.

recaudacion.title: We collect royalties
recaudacion.description: We collect licences from music users and distribute the proceeds.

pago.title: We pay you
pago.description: You receive your royalty payment directly to your account, transparently.

convenios.title: International reach
convenios.subtitle: Thanks to our agreements with IFPI and WIPO, your rights are protected worldwide.

cta.title: Want to register?
cta.subtitle: Contact us and an SGP representative will guide you through the process.

hero.title: ISRC Code
hero.subtitle: The International Standard Recording Code is the unique identifier for each phonogram

whatIs.title: What is ISRC?
whatIs.description: The ISRC (International Standard Recording Code) is a 12-character code that uniquely identifies each sound recording or music video internationally. SGP is the national ISRC registration agency in Paraguay.

whyNeed.title: Why do you need an ISRC?

items.identificacion: Identifies your recording on any platform worldwide
items.regalias: Facilitates royalty collection on digital platforms
items.streaming: Required for distribution on Spotify, Apple Music, etc.

form.title: Request your ISRC code
form.success: Request received! We'll contact you within 48 hours.
form.error: There was an error. Please try again.

hero.title: About SGP
hero.subtitle: Protecting the rights of Paraguayan phonographic producers since our founding

mision.title: Our mission
mision.description: SGP is a private entity dedicated to the collective management of phonographic producers' rights in Paraguay. We represent national and international producers, ensuring they receive fair compensation for the use of their works.

ifpiWipo.title: Members of IFPI and WIPO
ifpiWipo.description: Through our agreements with the International Federation of the Phonographic Industry (IFPI) and the World Intellectual Property Organization (WIPO), Paraguayan producers have their rights protected in more than 70 countries.

marcoLegal.title: Legal framework
marcoLegal.description: SGP operates under the framework of Law No. 1328/98 on Copyright and Related Rights of Paraguay, which establishes the protection of phonographic producers' rights.

hero.title: News
hero.subtitle: The latest from the phonographic industry and SGP

hero.title: Awards & Recognition
hero.subtitle: Celebrating the success of Paraguayan phonographic producers

streaming.title: Streaming Awards
streaming.description: SGP presents awards to Paraguayan artists and producers who reach significant milestones on streaming platforms such as Spotify, Apple Music, YouTube and more.

propya.title: Propya Awards
propya.description: The Propya Awards are the Paraguayan phonographic industry prizes, organised by SGP to recognise excellence in national music production.

hero.title: Contact
hero.subtitle: We're here to help. Get in touch through any of these channels.

form.error: There was an error. Please try again.
